head: Center fireseal mount ring
source_text: the complete ring which is fastened to the gas generator case by mounting brackets

head: Upper half of center fireseal mount ring
tail: Lower half of center fireseal mount ring
source_text: The upper and lower halves are bolted together to form a complete ring

head: Coupling shaft
source_text: a coupling shaft attached to the rear hub of the rotor

head: Coupling shaft
source_text: the compressor turbine drives the accessory gearbox through a coupling shaft

head: Rear hub
source_text: The hub is an extension of the first-stage compressor disk.

head: Gas generator assembly
tail: Flange interface at forward end of gas generator casing
source_text: A flange at the front end of the gas generator casing forms the attachment point for the power section

head: Gas generator assembly
tail: Studs interface at rear of inlet case
source_text: studs at the rear of the inlet case carry the accessory gearbox

head: Apply silicone adhesive to the mating surfaces
source_text: apply silicone adhesive (PWC08-002) to the mating surfaces

head: Machine remaining stub to dimension
source_text: Face (machine) the remaining stub to dimension using a cutter (PWC32483)

head: Machine remaining stub to dimension
source_text: Face (machine) the remaining stub to dimension using a cutter (PWC32483) with a gage (PWC32484)

head: Clean the exterior of the spray tubes
source_text: Clean the exterior of the spray tubes with a soft cloth moistened in solvent

head: Position ring halves on gas generator case and secure to mounting brackets
source_text: secure with bolts (1) inserted from the inside

head: Clean inside gas generator case
source_text: Clean inside gas generator case with suitable suction cleaner.

head: Tighten and torque nuts 32 to 36 lb.in
source_text: Tighten and torque the nuts 32 to 36 lb.in.

head: Nut 6
source_text: Tighten the washers (5) and nuts (6) and torque 45 to 55 lb.in.

head: Locate left-hand spray tube on front face of rear fireseal
source_text: Tighten nuts and torque 35 to 40 lb.in.

head: Tighten coupling nuts of both spray tubes
source_text: Tighten coupling nuts of both spray tubes to 270 to 300 lb.in

head: Allow sealant to cure
source_text: Allow the sealant to cure at room temperature for approximately 72 hours
